action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 5 completed training for 2 epochs in ~395s (~6.5 min), achieving val AP 0.0828. The pure-PyTorch model works. No eval has been submitted yet. We have 25 iterations and ~5.8 hours left. Analysis: We must validate the end-to-end pipeline (predict.py + checkpoint) on the hidden test set to get the first primary metric and confirm no runtime errors. Decision: Run a quick checkpoint load sanity check, then immediately submit eval. After that, scale up training epochs and tune architecture.
action.command: python -c "import torch; ckpt=torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu'); print('keys:', ckpt.keys()); print('args:', ckpt.get('args', {}))"
